_note: 2HDM Type-II benchmark: mh=125, mH=500, mA=450, mHp=500, tanb=5, sin(beta-alpha)=0.999, m12^2=150^2 GeV^2. hb_allowed=False because heavy A/H channels exceed 95% CL. chi2_total near SM reference (hs_consistent=True due to SM-like h couplings). obsratio_max interval: [1.05, 1.30] expected from HB-5.10.2 at this benchmark.
